alerts.title: Iran rejects IAEA inspections of bombed nuclear sites; missile program off-table
alerts.summary: Iran stated missile program is not part of US-Switzerland talks and explicitly ruled out IAEA inspections of damaged nuclear facilities. Combined with confirmed 60% U-235 enrichment and ~1-2 week breakout window, this represents hardened Iranian position against transparency measures critical to verification. Incidents feed reports multiple outlets covering this stance.

alerts.title: Threat level elevated to 9/10 as Gaza, Lebanon strikes continue amid US-Iran talks
alerts.summary: Global metrics confirm threat level upgraded to CRITICAL—IMMINENT ESCALATION (9/10). Concurrent incidents show Israeli strikes killing civilians in Gaza (including Al Jazeera cameraman) and Lebanon (3 killed in Beirut suburbs, environmental activist Mona Khalil confirmed dead). Escalation occurs while US-Iran nuclear negotiations are actively underway in Switzerland, raising accidental-escalation risk.

alerts.title: Iran president heads to Pakistan; mediators claim progress on Hormuz, Lebanon de-escalation
alerts.summary: Iran's president is traveling to Pakistan as US-Iran negotiating teams pursue finalization of war-ending deal. Mediators claim 'progress' on easing Hormuz and Lebanon tensions within 60-day framework. However, simultaneous Iranian rejection of IAEA inspections and missile-program exclusions signal limited flexibility, creating risk of talks stalling and hard-liners escalating.

alerts.title: US submarine USS Florida confirmed in Persian Gulf amid escalating threat posture
alerts.summary: Assets feed confirms USS Florida submarine now deployed in Persian Gulf (25.93°N, 51.75°E) alongside four carrier strike groups and three Red Sea destroyers. Submarine presence in confined Gulf waters during nuclear negotiations and elevated threat level (9/10) signals preparation for potential rapid-response strike operations against Iranian nuclear or military targets.
alerts.region: Persian Gulf / Red Sea / Arabian Sea

alerts.title: Trump administration rhetoric on Iran escalates despite active Switzerland negotiations
alerts.summary: Telegram channels (Middle East Spectator, score 74.3) carry Trump Truth Social post claiming Iran's military 'DONE,' navy 'GONE,' and economy 'BROKEN'—language designed for domestic audience but received as hostile signal by Tehran negotiators. Post flagged for 'missile' and 'drone' keywords and reached ~46K views. Pattern matches previous alert cycle wherein threats precede dialogue attempts, destabilizing ceasefire.

analysis_note: US-Iran nuclear diplomacy at critical juncture: while 60-day Treasury waiver and negotiation framework remain active, Iranian hardening (IAEA inspection rejection, missile-program exclusion) and concurrent Israeli escalation in Gaza-Lebanon theater create high risk of diplomatic collapse and uncontrolled proxy-war expansion within weeks.
